textByHashes.cbb2ddb415f820c23979d3034c236ca570819b85: Hello traveller, are you here to help or just to watch?
textByHashes.949358f720a93e32372c62608f944fd8e01ffbff: Excellent we need all the help we can get.
textByHashes.4575283559a23a77ddad6df1b14eb32f977815ed: I'm commander Montai. The orb is in the Khazard stronghold to the north, but until we weaken their defences we can't get close.
textByHashes.67ba29a70a4485dabf52625de4e67a344268aced: Firstly we need to strengthen our own defences. We desperately need wood to make more battlements, once the battlements are gone it's all over. Six loads of normal logs should do it.
textByHashes.a802d773ce28b684b192b1dd82293a1f1ab5841a: That's a shame, we could have done with your help.
textByHashes.5f4fd457a3212e74b09d45e719a30bc7fd8b08e1: Please be as quick as you can, I don't know how much longer we can hold out.
textByHashes.1ceb450cd6177514a48afd98cf45185359bb0dfc: Hello again, we're still desperate for wood soldier. We need six loads of normal logs.
textByHashes.a4ee5a0a56cf02b9cac068476a39670982ef1f1b: Hello again, we're still desperate for wood soldier.
textByHashes.301fd589325e2c29bd934e8235f31e7df9f3d25d: That's excellent, now we can make more defensive battlements. Give me a moment to organise the troops and then come speak to me. I'll inform you of our next phase of attack.
textByHashes.c4de81b847077dca42af82d5f860ae04a6b9d4bd: We're hanging in there soldier. For the next phase of our attack we need to breach their stronghold.
textByHashes.cafe51f6c3b1884bffc9b8d6915dfa51b4b9b0a6: The ballista can break through the stronghold wall, and then we can advance and seize back the orb.
textByHashes.7f59c6ec9ee394171a04a584ae0d5c92fe792dac: From this distance we can't get an accurate enough shot. We need the correct coordinates of the stronghold for a direct hit. I've sent out three tracker gnomes to gather them.
textByHashes.579d81423c64ab769155b11f34d808cb3f1854c8: I'm afraid not, and we're running out of time. I need you to go into the heart of the battlefield, find the trackers, and bring back the coordinates.
textByHashes.3fa944d1f0a3232526d96c8e47b43beece3c9bce: Do you think you can do it?
textByHashes.3a8aaf499993cec66c7c51e86fc040e717646b9b: I understand, this isn't your fight.
textByHashes.4185e305f6a124eb3320328a4b0b8f7988863ebb: Thank you, you're braver than most.
textByHashes.acf93646619d6b269e12743f65a831dccbacba1a: I don't know how long I will be able to hold out. Once you have the coordinates come back and fire the ballista right into those monsters.
textByHashes.665e0423a0512ae810d94405389cc8cf6d354631: If you can retrieve the orb and bring safety back to my people, none of the blood spilled on this field will be in vain.
textByHashes.c331b01e95681c8522ce930f8d9df5d4555c5146: Hello warrior. We need the coordinates for a direct hit from the ballista. Once you have a direct hit you will be able to enter the stronghold and retrieve the orb.
textByHashes.a672ed8afc5f2d25928cb9cc7d64cffb942b5fab: I saw, that was a beautiful sight. The Khazard troops didn't know what hit them.
textByHashes.92f34646fe0c5a32f344e4f33fd0a533fbb96192: Now is the time to retrieve the orb. It's all in your hands. I'll be praying for you.
textByHashes.55322ce4533eb9ac2b40e768de98578e7db38486: Incredible, for a human you really are something.
textByHashes.0bb8bb619ecd47fa5161fbe01392587a659e9524: I'll stay here with my troops and try and hold Khazard's men back. You return the orb to the gnome village. Go as quick as you can, the village is still unprotected.
textByHashes.8881d0eda0cc0ee6310973e9d3f572dde6d219f5: I'm ok, this battle is going to take longer to win than I expected. The Khazard troops won't give up even without the orb.
textByHashes.3247381b3ad3a198700f60c88c62cecaef2e5079: I can't talk now. Can't you see we're trying to win a battle here? If we can't hold back Khazard's men we're all doomed.
